case_title: MUNZER DAJANI VS. UNITED AIR LINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DAJANI, MUNZER AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAJANI, MUNZER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-14-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAJANI, MUNZER AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SHEILA WHITTREDGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
